NASB Financial, Inc. (OTCQX: NASB) declares $0.25 per share quarterly cash dividend, paid on Dec 27, 2024 to stockholders.

news.headline: Buchanan's Scotch Whisky donates $150,000 to create 'Más Noches Buenas' for 200% foodservice workers this holiday season.
news.summary: The 'Más Noches Buenas' campaign by Buchanan's is a follow-up to the successful 'We Are the Spirit of the 200%' Campaign. This initiative, led by Marcello Hernández, encourages fans to fully indulge in the 200% holiday spirit. The campaign includes a lineup of lively events, engaging digital content, and financial support for individuals who go above and beyond to enrich our community. Join us in celebrating the holiday season with Buchanan's and embody the true essence of giving back.

news.headline: Asia-Pacific Household Products Industry valued at $98.9 billion in 2023 to reach $123.4 billion by 2028, with 4.5% CAGR. Major players include Unilever, Procter & Gamble, Essity, Kao, and S.C. Johnson & Son.
news.summary: ResearchAndMarkets.com has added the "Opportunities in the Asia-Pacific Household Products Industry 2024" report to its offerings. In 2023, the Asia-Pacific household products industry was valued at $98.9 billion and is projected to achieve a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 4.5%. By 2028, it is anticipated to reach $123.4 billion. The report outlines the current scenario in the household industry and provides insights on future prospects concerning ingredients, product claims, labeling, and distribution.

news.headline: Tema introduces first Electrification ETF ($VOLT) on Nasdaq, aiming for long-term growth by investing in companies benefiting from electrification, with AI, mobility, digitization, and reindustrialization driving power demand; trillions to be unlocked in investment.
news.summary: New York-based investment firm, Tema ETFs, has recently unveiled the Tema Electrification ETF (VOLT) on the Nasdaq exchange. This groundbreaking ETF is the world's initial fund aiming to achieve sustained growth by focusing on companies that capitalize on the electrification megacycle. Key drivers such as artificial intelligence, mobility advancements, digitization, and reindustrialization have led to a surge in power demand not witnessed in several decades, stimulating massive investment estimated in trillions of dollars within the electrification sector. The VOLT ETF portfolio will target these growth opportunities.

news.headline: Peacock Network to premiere "Traveling the Spectrum" on Dec. 12, 2024, showcasing transformative power of travel.
news.summary: A captivating new program showcasing the profound impact of traveling is set to enchant audiences nationwide. Recently disclosed by Visit Myrtle Beach, the innovative series titled "Traveling the Spectrum" is scheduled to launch on Dec. 12, 2024, exclusively on the Peacock streaming platform. This transformative show aims to illustrate the diverse spectrum of experiences travel can offer, portraying how it shapes and enriches lives. Viewers can tune in to witness these remarkable journeys unfold, starting this December.

news.headline: Viral Vaccines Market projected to reach $64.18 billion by 2031 per Meticulous Research report.
news.summary: In Redding, California, a recent market research report has revealed significant insights into the Viral Vaccines Market as of December 4, 2024. The report covers crucial aspects such as market size, share, forecasts, and trend analysis. It categorizes viral vaccines based on form into liquid and lyophilized, while also distinguishing between types such as live attenuated, mRNA, and inactivated vaccines. Furthermore, the report examines various routes of administration including intramuscular, subcutaneous, and oral delivery methods. This comprehensive analysis provides valuable information to stakeholders in the industry.

news.headline: Dr. Feneisha Franklin MD, FAAFP named Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence by The Inner Circle for Family and Geriatric Medicine.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on December 4, 2024, in Lexington, South Carolina, Dr. Feneisha Franklin, MD, FAAFP, was recognized as a distinguished member of The Inner Circle. Known for her expertise in Family and Geriatric Medicine, Dr. Franklin has achieved the esteemed status of Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence. This acknowledgment reflects her commitment to providing exceptional healthcare services.

Global automotive cybersecurity market projected to reach $3574.5 million by 2030, with a 29.6% CAGR growth.

It is also segmented by application into passenger cars and commercial vehicles. The market is experiencing growth globally, with significant numbers expected in this sector.

news.headline: Edwards Lifesciences sets sights on growth at conference, targets 8-10% sales increase for 2025 with focus on heart therapies. CEO highlights innovations in TAVR and TMTT.
news.summary: During its annual investor conference, Edwards Lifesciences Corporation (NYSE:EW) revealed its strategy for sustained long-term growth and advancements in structural heart therapies. The company, now solely dedicated to structural heart solutions, highlighted its strong technology pipeline, financial guidance, and increasing opportunities in Transcatheter Aortic Valve Replacement (TAVR) and Transcatheter Mitral and Tricuspid Therapies (TMTT). CEO Bernard Zovighian forecasted a robust 2025, anticipating sales growth of 8% to 10% due to advancements in TAVR and TMTT technologies. Zovighian emphasized the company's dedication to enhancing patient care through innovative products like the SAPIEN valve platform, PASCAL, and EVOQUE.

news.headline: At an event, experts from BlackRock, Grayscale, FTSE Russell, Galaxy discussed crypto's future, highlighting the importance of education and regulation. Financial products like ETFs could mitigate risks. Regulatory clarity is crucial for broader adoption. More details on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: During the Benzinga Future of Digital Assets event, a panel of experts discussed key topics shaping the digital currencies landscape: regulation's impact and investor education. Moderated by Erik LaPaglia, the panel included representatives from BlackRock, Grayscale Investments, FTSE Russell, and Galaxy. They explored how financial products such as ETFs, options, and futures can lower risks and improve accessibility to digital assets. The discussion highlighted the importance of regulatory clarity for wider adoption. Galaxy's Paul Cappelli stressed the need for consistent rules, stating it is crucial for industry growth. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Progressive Planet reports record Q2 net income of $1.05 million, up from $257K last year. Gross margin hits 38.6%.
news.summary: Progressive Planet Solutions Inc. has reported its highest-ever gross margin of 38.6%. The operational income surged to $1.05 million in Q2, up from $257,000 in the same period last year. The rising profitability has allowed the recognition of deferred income tax assets on the balance sheet. The company's cost-cutting plan and focus on higher-margin products have led to significant profitability improvements. The increased EBITDA from $205,000 to $902,000 and revenue from $5.438 million to $5.468 million showcase the successful fiscal strategies. CEO Steve Harpur expressed pride in the team's achievements and emphasized the continuous focus on delivering sustainable shareholder value. These positive results reflect the company's commitment to long-term growth and operational excellence.

news.headline: Wormhole initiates staking program for W token holders on Solana & EVM chains, boosting governance and rewards.
news.summary: Wormhole has recently launched a Staking Rewards Program aimed at W token holders participating on Solana and EVM chains. This initiative is designed to improve governance processes and boost rewards for users within the Wormhole ecosystem. This program offers a unique opportunity for W token holders to actively engage in the platform and benefit from staking activities on both Solana and EVM chains. Through this program, participants can contribute to the network's operations and governance while earning rewards based on their staked W tokens. Overall, this new development is set to enhance user participation and incentivize engagement within the Wormhole ecosystem across different chains.

This initiative consolidates various entities such as Siticom, iTuma, Orange Networks, and Logicalis Germany into a single unified structure.

The company deemed this impairment necessary due to a decrease in the value of its investments in specific China joint ventures. As a result, GM is assessing the consequences of SGM's restructuring plans and recent initiatives aimed at enhancing market share and financial performance. General Motors anticipates recognizing around ... in additional equity losses.

Dollar Tree reports Q3 EPS of $1.12, sales of $7.57 billion, and same-store sales increase of 1.8%. Family Dollar same-store sales up 1.9%.
news.summary: Dollar Tree, Inc. (NASDAQ:DLTR) posted a third-quarter adjusted EPS of $1.12, marking a 15.5% rise from the previous year and surpassing the anticipated $1.07. The discount variety store chain's sales for the quarter reached $7.57 billion, indicating a 3.5% increase from a year earlier and exceeding the expected $7.44 billion. Enterprise same-store net sales saw a 1.8% uptick, fueled by a 1.6% rise in traffic and a 0.2% climb in average ticket. Dollar Tree witnessed a similar 1.8% increase in same-store net sales, with traffic up by 1.5% and average ticket up by 0.3%. Family Dollar reported a 1.9% rise in same-store net sales, driven by a 1.8% surge in traffic and a flat average ticket. Dollar Tree remains dedicated to finalizing its formal review.

news.headline: Eli Lilly's Zepbound offers 47% greater weight loss than Novo Nordisk's Wegovy, with Zepbound showing an average weight loss of 20.2% compared to Wegovy's 13.7%.
news.summary: Eli Lilly And Co (LLY) recently disclosed data from the SURMOUNT-5 phase 3b trial, comparing the effectiveness and safety of Zepbound (tirzepatide) with Novo Nordisk A/S’ Wegovy (semaglutide) in adults with obesity or overweight with certain comorbidities. The trial included individuals without diabetes. Zepbound demonstrated a 47% higher relative weight loss than Wegovy. In detailed phase 3 data, Zepbound showcased a superior weight loss of 20.2% on average compared to 13.7% with Wegovy. Of note, 99% of Mounjaro/Zepbound patients remained diabetes-free even after 3 years. To access the full story, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: GM faces billions in charges due to decline in value of its China joint ventures. Stocks trading lower as equity losses expected.
news.summary: General Motors Company, listed on NYSE as GM, saw a decline in share price after deciding to write off a significant portion of its equity stake in SAIC General Motors Corporation Limited (SGM). The company made this choice due to a decrease in the value of its investments in some China joint ventures. It is currently assessing the effects of SGM's restructuring plans and recent measures to enhance market share and profitability. General Motors anticipates incurring further equity losses amounting to approximately [specific amount not provided]. For more information, please refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Aramco partners with Linde and Schlumberger in a CCS hub; Aramco holds 60%, Linde and SLB each 20%.
news.summary: Aramco, the leading oil giant in Saudi Arabia, has signed a shareholders' agreement with Linde plc and Schlumberger N.V. to create a significant Carbon Capture and Storage (CCS) hub, slated to become one of the world's largest. In this project, Aramco will possess a majority stake of 60%, while Linde and SLB will each have a 20% ownership. The establishment of this CCS hub marks a crucial move in Aramco's efforts to reduce emissions. This initiative signifies a major step forward in achieving environmental goals.

One of the companies under scrutiny is Profire Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: PFIE). This investigation is being conducted in relation to shareholder interests.

Experian acquires Audigent - boosts identity and activation capabilities in advertising. Expands data integration.
news.summary: Experian, a global data and technology company based in Costa Mesa, California, has recently completed the acquisition of Audigent, a prominent data activation and identity platform within the advertising sector. This acquisition signifies Experian's commitment to expanding its already robust marketing data and identity offerings in the advertising domain. Through Audigent's first-party publisher data and extensive inventory network, Experian now possesses enhanced capabilities in sell-side distribution to complement its existing demand-side operations. This strategic move strengthens Experian's position in the advertising industry, solidifying its comprehensive suite of services.

Global Commercial Cleaning Services Market is expected to reach USD 443.23 Billion by 2033, with a 6.7% CAGR.Increased demand due to health awareness, tech advancements, outsourcing, green practices, regulations, and urbanization drive sector growth.
news.summary: The global Commercial Cleaning Services Market was valued at approximately USD 247.50 billion in 2023 and is expected to reach USD 262.35 billion in 2024, with a projected market size of around USD 443.23 billion by 2033, at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of about 6.7% during the forecast period 2024 to 2033. Factors contributing to this growth include increased health and hygiene awareness due to the COVID-19 pandemic, technological advancements in cleaning equipment, a shift towards sustainability and green cleaning practices, outsourcing trends in businesses, regulatory compliance requirements, and urbanization and infrastructure development in emerging economies. Partnerships and acquisitions in the market include Aramark Corporation's exclusive partnership with Healthcare Plus Solutions Group and Anago Cleaning Systems' franchise expansion in Nebraska.
